case_title: YVONNE DE LOS REYES VS. ARTURO SACAPANIO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, YVONNE DE LOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SACAPANIO, ARTURO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREMISES RESTORED TO PLTF. ON 7/10/02. $7,366.80 RENT, $233.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,600.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, YVONNE DE LOS AS TO DEFENDANT SACAPANIO, ARTURO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, YVONNE DE LOS SERVED JUN-01-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT SACAPANIO, ARTURO
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $56.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, YVONNE DE LOS
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, YVONNE DE LOS SERVED JUN-01-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SACAPANIO, ARTURO
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SACAPANIO, ARTURO
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, COST BILL $233.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SACAPANIO, ARTURO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SACAPANIO, ARTURO
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY; REQUEST FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, YVONNE DE LOS
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SACAPANIO, ARTURO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SACAPANIO, ARTURO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, YVONNE DE LOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SACAPANIO, ARTURO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4796 MISSION ST. #206, S.F. CA., INCLUDING ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS AND ALL OTHER OCCUPANTS, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
